description_long: This bungalow features a prominent red hip roof and a white exterior, with a spacious front garden adorned with palm trees and flower beds. The front facade includes a balcony with decorative railings and a covered porch area, providing shaded outdoor seating. A paved driveway leads to a garage on the right side, with an additional covered carport and a small upper terrace. The windows are large and rectangular, arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some grouped on the side and a distinctive arched window at the rear. The landscaping is lush, with manicured lawns, shrubs, and a pathway leading to the main entrance. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, creating a welcoming residential appearance.
description: A white bungalow with a red hip roof, front garden, balcony, and attached garage, featuring symmetrical windows and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, porch, and landscaped garden with palm trees and flower beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, carport, and additional terrace, with visible garden and street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered terrace, arched window, and row of shrubs along the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden, grouped windows, and side entrance, with palm trees and pathway visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and arched rear window
